productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Magenta T-shirt
description: Composition Red round neck t-shirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, with full arm sleeves that have ribbed hems, ribbed shirt hem and brand name printed across the chest Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Subtle and stylish, this red full sleeve t-shirt from the united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The branding across the chest enhances your royal fashion statement, while the long sleeves keep the winter chill at bay. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look this winter. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
